org.moeaframework.problem.LSMOP.CorrelationMatrix

Package
Description
org.moeaframework.problem.LSMOP
Package for the scalable LSMOP test problem suite.

  • Uses of CorrelationMatrix in org.moeaframework.problem.LSMOP

    Fields in org.moeaframework.problem.LSMOP declared as CorrelationMatrix
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final CorrelationMatrix
    CorrelationMatrix.Full
    Creates a full correlation matrix where every decision variable group is included in the objective value calculation.
    static final CorrelationMatrix
    CorrelationMatrix.Overlapped
    Creates a correlation matrix where the i-th and (i+1)-th decision variable groups are associated with the i-th objective.
    static final CorrelationMatrix
    CorrelationMatrix.Separable
    Creates a correlation matrix with no correlation.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.problem.LSMOP with parameters of type CorrelationMatrix
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description

    Constructs a new LSMOP problem instance.
